author: xrs_01
content:
Hey guys I wrote an ethresearch post on zkEVM parallelization that shards the execution capacity of the network by recursively aggregating snark proofs of valid execution network-wide if anybody is interested.

https://ethresear.ch/t/why-homogenizing-the-execution-of-the-world-computer-beats-scaling-through-fragmentation/24860

Hard to explain but I call it 'Delegated Execution Sharding'.
